items.name: Christmas Tree Sword
items.description: This dangerous holiday sword may look fun, but it will be anything but for your foe. Each hit will do 34 damage and if you manage to KO your opponent they'll be wrapped up like a gift.

items.name: Faux Firebrand
items.description: The magical weapon of the Brothers Ignis, a 1000-strong force of battlehardened shocktroops.

items.name: Harpoon
items.description: Catches small objects and brings them to you.

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Spellbook
items.description: Use the spell contained in this book to help stabilize the warring clans of ROBLOX.  Click to summon a protective shield that you can then fire at enemies.

items.name: Spring Sunshine
items.description: You're just all sunshine and flowers!  Literally!  Bring the sun and have flowers grow everywhere you go.

items.name: Trusty Blade
items.description: This well rounded sword is well suited for blocking daggers, but vulnerable to bigger blades.  Does 35 damage per attack.

items.name: DarkAge Nunchuks
items.description: Swing these bad boys around by clicking and deal 15 damage.  Dare to double click?  The nunchuks will split in two and do double damage. When equipped, you hold the nunchuks out in front of you in both hands.

items.name: Pizza Sword
items.description: Sometimes you cut the pizza, sometimes the pizza cuts you.

items.name: Ghost Ship
items.description: Launch a deadly ghost ship at your foes to do 60 damage.

items.name: Year of the Dragon Lantern
items.description: Light the lantern to invoke the protection of the ancient dragon spirits.  If anyone is foolish enough to attack you while you are surrounded by dragon spirits, well then maybe they get what they deserve.

items.name: Wooden Club
items.description: Cavemen used these to hunt their prey. I'm pretty sure they needed a bigger one for the woolly mammoths.

items.name: DarkAge Naginata
items.description: Fight with the strength and power of the DarkAge Ninjas.

items.name: Knights of the Seventh Sanctum : Dual Duel Axes
items.description: You're dueling.  Your opponent has an axe... but you have two!  Wield the unholy relics of the Seventh Sanctum and no one else stands a chance... unless they have these axes too.  But how likely is that?

items.name: Amerilaser Blaster
items.description: Blast your foes all the way back to 1776.  Looks great in places with dynamic lighting enabled!

items.name: The Luck O' the Irish
items.description: You just got McPwned.

items.name: Viridian Katana
items.description: Sometimes it is easy being green.  Easy to slash through foes, easy to win the battle, easy to win the war.

items.name: Advanced Exploding Lab Table
items.description: A lab table fit for a senior mad scientist. Click to drop the table where you're standing. A few seconds later, it explodes! The table breaks apart and pieces flung everywhere as well as dangerous chemicals.

items.name: Emerald Hyperbike
items.description: Travel at hyperspeed and leave a trail of burning green light behind you.  Now with improved acceleration!

items.name: Deluxe Beach Ball
items.description: Hit the ball back and forth with friends.  Just another chill day on the ROBLOXIAN beachfront.

items.name: Civil War Artillery
items.description: Equip and click this gear to drop a real live cannon in front of you.  Control the cannons direction with the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' keys - lift and lower it with the cannon with the 'Q' and 'E' keys.  When you've got your shot set up - sit on the cannon and click! Hitting the 'X' key will remove it from the map.

items.name: Harbinger of Fimbulwinter
items.description: Arm yourself in preparation for the Battle for Midgard! Mete out icy punishment with this heavy iron hammer. In the arms of a true Ice God, this weapon becomes especially potent.

items.name: Bladed Tutu
items.description: You'll be looking sharp in this bladed tutu. Spin attack to do 15 damage to your foes and teach them the true meaning of the black swan.

items.name: Bluesteel Alterer of Destiny
items.description: The future of all lays within your hands.  Will you change the destiny of the world for the better?

items.name: Staff of Crimson Chaos Fire
items.description: Ignis Rex once scourged an entire nation with flames, creating in the process the vast glassy field now known as the Obsidian Flat, before he was eventually contained and imprisoned deep beneath the Earth.

items.name: Boomerang
items.description: Enjoy a nice peaceful game of catch... with yourself or a friend!

items.name: Double Damage Frog
items.description: Throw this double damage frog at your foes. If it hits them, his poison rubs off on them and they turn blue for twenty seconds!  Any damage you do to them during this time is doubly effective!

items.name: Sword of Swords
items.description: Yo Dawg!  We heard you liked swords, so we made you a sword made of swords so you can slash while you slash.

items.name: Paper Sword
items.description: Okay - let's be real here - a paper sword does as much damage as well....paper.  But it does do some other silly stuff.

items.name: Alien Parasite
items.description: Steals your enemy's health and replenishes your own!

items.name: RoMaze
items.description: It's romazing.  Unfortunately no one can be told what the RoMaze is. You have to experience it for yourself.
